name: Barbell Bench Press
description: The classic horizontal pressing movement. Lie on a bench, lower the bar to mid-chest, press up.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
description: Press dumbbells on an incline bench (~30 degrees). Emphasises upper chest.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Bench press variation with dumbbells. Greater range of motion than barbell.

name: Push-Up
description: Bodyweight pressing movement. Keep your body straight from head to heels.

name: Overhead Press
description: Standing barbell press. Press from shoulders to overhead. Brace the core hard.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
description: Seated or standing dumbbell press to overhead.

name: Lateral Raise
description: Raise dumbbells out to the sides until parallel with the floor. Strict form, light weight.

name: Tricep Dip
description: Lower yourself between parallel bars, push back up. Lean forward for chest emphasis.

name: Tricep Pushdown
description: Cable tricep extension. Keep elbows pinned to your sides.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
description: Bench press with a narrower grip (shoulder-width). Heavy tricep emphasis.

name: Pull-Up
description: Hang from a bar, pull yourself until your chin clears it. Overhand grip.

name: Chin-Up
description: Underhand-grip pull-up. Heavier bicep involvement than pull-ups.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Seated cable pulldown. Pull the bar down to upper chest, control the eccentric.

name: Barbell Row
description: Bent-over row. Hinge at the hips, pull the bar to the lower chest.

name: Dumbbell Row
description: Single-arm row, knee on bench. Focus on squeezing the back at the top.

name: Seated Cable Row
description: Seated row with a cable. Drive elbows back, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: Face Pull
description: Cable pull to the face with rope attachment. High reps, focus on rear delts.

name: Barbell Curl
description: Standing barbell bicep curl. Keep elbows pinned, full range of motion.

name: Hammer Curl
description: Dumbbell curl with a neutral (hammer) grip. Hits brachialis and forearms.

name: Deadlift
description: Lift a loaded bar from the floor to standing. The most fundamental pulling movement.

name: Back Squat
description: Bar across upper back. Squat down until thighs parallel or below, drive up.

name: Front Squat
description: Bar across the front delts. More upright torso, heavier quad emphasis.

name: Goblet Squat
description: Hold a dumbbell at chest height, squat down. Beginner-friendly.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Hinge at hips with slight knee bend, lower bar to mid-shin, return.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: Rear-foot-elevated single-leg squat. Brutal but effective.

name: Leg Press
description: Press the platform away with your feet. Foot placement changes muscle emphasis.

name: Walking Lunge
description: Step forward into a lunge, push up and through to the next step.

name: Leg Curl
description: Curl the platform toward your glutes. Isolated hamstring work.

name: Leg Extension
description: Extend the legs against resistance. Pure quad isolation.

name: Calf Raise
description: Raise on the balls of your feet. Full range, controlled tempo.

name: Hip Thrust
description: Upper back on bench, bar across hips, drive hips up. Top glute exercise.

name: Treadmill Run
description: Run at chosen pace and incline. Easy to control intensity.

name: Cycling
description: Stationary or outdoor cycling. Low joint impact.

name: Rowing Machine
description: Drive with legs, hinge at hips, pull with arms. True full-body cardio.

name: Stair Climber
description: Continuous stepping. Heavy lower-body cardio.

name: Elliptical
description: Low-impact cross-trainer. Use the arms for upper-body involvement.

name: Jump Rope
description: Skip rope at varying tempos. Excellent for conditioning.

name: Sprint Intervals
description: Short maximum-effort sprints with rest. High-intensity conditioning.

name: Swimming
description: Continuous swimming, any stroke. Zero-impact cardio.

name: Box Jump
description: Jump from standing onto a box. Step down, repeat. Explosive lower-body.

name: Burpee
description: Squat, plank, push-up, jump. The classic full-body conditioning move.

name: Plank
description: Hold a forearm plank. Brace everything; keep a straight line head to heels.

name: Side Plank
description: Plank on one forearm, body sideways. Hits obliques.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: Hang from a bar, raise legs to 90 degrees or higher. Strict form.

name: Cable Crunch
description: Kneeling cable crunch. Round the spine, contract the abs hard.

name: Russian Twist
description: Sit with feet up, rotate the torso side to side. Slow and controlled.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: Kneel, roll the wheel out, return. Ridiculously hard at full range.

name: Dead Bug
description: Lying on back, alternate opposite arm and leg. Anti-extension drill.

name: Bird Dog
description: On hands and knees, extend opposite arm and leg. Slow and stable.

name: Pallof Press
description: Hold a cable at chest height, press out, hold. Anti-rotation.

name: Hollow Body Hold
description: Lying on back, lift shoulders and legs slightly off the floor, hold.

name: Reverse Crunch
description: Lying on back, curl knees to chest. Lower abs focus.
